title: Measure Ruler: Themed (config + CSS)

chart.options: chart: { id: 'themed', type: 'area', height: 380, background: '#0b1220', foreColor: '#93a4bd', fontFamily: "'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif", animations: { enabled: false }, toolbar: { show: false }, zoom: { enabled: true, type: 'x' }, measure: { enabled: true, mode: 'span', // config tokens: brand up/down + currency readout + custom two-line label colors: { up: '#24d1a6', down: '#f0637c' }, format: { y: function (v) { return (v >= 0 ? '+' : '') + '$' + Math.abs(v).toLocaleString() } }, label: function (info) { var pct = (info.percentChange >= 0 ? '+' : '') + info.percentChange.toFixed(1) + '%' return [ (info.dy >= 0 ? '+' : '') + '$' + Math.abs(info.dy).toLocaleString() + ' ' + pct, 'sessions ' + info.from.x + ' to ' + info.to.x, ] }, }, }, theme: { mode: 'dark' }, stroke: { width: 2, curve: 'smooth' }, dataLabels: { enabled: false }, fill: { type: 'gradient', gradient: { opacityFrom: 0.35, opacityTo: 0.02 } }, colors: ['#24d1a6'], grid: { borderColor: '#1c2740' }, title: { text: 'Revenue (drag to measure a move)', align: 'left' }, xaxis: { type: 'numeric', title: { text: 'Session' } }, yaxis: { labels: { formatter: function (v) { return '$' + (v / 1000).toFixed(1) + 'k' } } },
